description: This is a selected area electron diffraction (SAED) pattern acquired from the D03 ordered ferrite matrix and κ'' (Fe,Mn)3AlCx carbide phase in Fe–10Al–xMn–1.0C casting alloys studied in the work. Diffraction spots belonging to the D03 matrix are marked with dashed lines, with indexed crystallographic planes including 000, 220, 400, and 200; diffraction spots belonging to the κ phase are marked with solid lines, with indexed planes including 111, 11-1, and 200. This pattern verifies that the orientation relationship between the D03 matrix and κ'' carbide is [1-11]_κ parallel to [220]_D03 and (011)_κ parallel to (001)_D03, which supports the conclusion that the κ'' precipitates exhibit specific orientation matching with the D03 matrix in the investigated Fe-Al-Mn-C alloy system.
